visual_description: The video opens on a very dark, almost black screen. The faint, indistinct shapes of what appear to be figures in armor are barely visible. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. The camera is shaky, suggesting a chaotic or action-filled moment. The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a large-scale battle. A powerful, orchestral score with a deep, driving rhythm and soaring, dramatic strings creates a sense of immense scale and high stakes. The camera pans across a large, dense formation of soldiers in dark, silhouetted armor. They are packed tightly together, creating a menacing and powerful image. The scene is extremely dark, with only the faint outlines of the figures and their armor visible. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera continues to move through the ranks of soldiers, revealing more of the chaotic scene. The soldiers, still mostly in shadow, are in a state of motion, as if charging or in the middle of a battle. The camera is low and close to the action, creating an immersive and intense perspective.
